summary: Implemented ADR 0268 so isolated worktrees declare bootstrap manifests, automatically rebuild the shared edge portal artifacts before governed runs continue, and fail early on missing controller-local inputs; validated the generic `live-apply-service` wrapper from a clean worktree and replayed the production `configure-edge-publication` path successfully on `nginx-lv3`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with-requirements requirements/docs.txt python -m pytest -q tests/test_docs_site.py tests/test_preflight_controller_local.py tests/test_correction_loops.py` returned `17 passed in 66.50s` after the bootstrap, docs-portal, and nested-shell regressions were fixed.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/workflow_catalog.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the committed ADR 0268 branch implementation.

verification.check: Fresh-worktree bootstrap recovery through the generic service wrapper
verification.observed: After removing `build/ops-portal/`, `build/changelog-portal/`, and `build/docs-portal/`, `make live-apply-service service=public-edge env=staging EXTRA_ARGS=--syntax-check` rebuilt all three directories through the new bootstrap manifests and reached the next `check-canonical-truth` gate. That gate stopped the wrapper on this branch because the protected `README.md` integration summary is intentionally deferred until merge-to-main.

`make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully after the repaired bootstrap path, with `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=4 failed=0` and the shared static portal directories republished through the NGINX edge.

`curl -I --max-time 20 https://grafana.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 302` to `/login`, `curl -I --max-time 20 https://nginx.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 200`, and both `https://docs.example.com` and `https://changelog.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 302` to the expected `/oauth2/sign_in` entrypoint with the shared `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow` headers intact.

notes: This receipt captures the isolated-worktree proof for ADR 0268. The follow-up merge-to-main step still needs to update the protected integration files `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`, then replay the merged-main production path and record the canonical mainline receipt.

The branch-local docs support fix is part of the ADR 0268 implementation scope because strict MkDocs warnings in `docs/adr/0094-developer-portal-and-documentation-site.md` prevented the declared `make docs` bootstrap artifact from materializing successfully in a fresh worktree.

The nested bootstrap shell now preserves the caller environment instead of spawning `/bin/bash -lc`, which prevents `python3` from falling back to the Xcode 3.9 interpreter during recursive `make generate-changelog-portal` runs.
